recommendations.title: Elemental
recommendations.overview: In a city where fire, water, land and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy will discover something elemental: how much they have in common.

recommendations.title: The Good Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An epic journey into the world of dinosaurs where an Apatosaurus named Arlo makes an unlikely human friend.

recommendations.title: Luca
recommendations.overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

recommendations.title: Storks

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their patriarch Gus, the Portokalos family travels to Greece for a family reunion, and to deliver Gus' journal to his old friends.

recommendations.title: Mater the Greater
recommendations.overview: Mater tells Lightning McQueen about his former job as a daredevil.

recommendations.title: He Never Died
recommendations.overview: Jack is a solitary man with a mysterious past. His strange habits will soon become stranger when his past catches up with him.

recommendations.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
recommendations.overview: Lorelei Lee is a beautiful showgirl engaged to be married to the wealthy Gus Esmond, much to the disapproval of Gus' rich father, Esmond Sr., who thinks that Lorelei is just after his money. When Lorelei goes on a cruise accompanied only by her best

recommendations.title: Remember Sunday

recommendations.title: Party Central
